phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main ordering counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está el mostrador principal para pedir?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOR prin-see-PAHL PAH-rah peh-DEER?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, a la derecha del todo.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah DEHL TOH-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the far right.

responses.english: At the back, on the far right.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah DEHL TOH-doh
responses.french: Al fondo, a la derecha del todo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if custom-filled ensaimadas are available today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen hoy ensaimadas rellenas personalizadas disponibles?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, TYEH-nen oy en-sah-ee-MAH-dahs reh-YEH-nahs per-so-nah-lee-SAH-dahs dee-po-nee-BLEHS?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are limited options today.

responses.english: Yes, there are limited options today.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to order a custom-filled ensaimada
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo pedir una ensaimada con relleno especial?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh PWEH-doh peh-DEER oo-nah en-sah-ee-MAH-dah kon reh-YEH-doh es-peh-SYAHL?

likely_response.local: Elija el relleno en la lista y páguelo en caja.
likely_response.pronunciation: eh-LEE-hah EHL rehl-LEH-noh EHN LAH LEE-stah Y PÁG-eh-loh EHN KAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: Choose filling from list and pay at register.

responses.english: Choose filling from list and pay at register.
responses.phonetic: eh-LEE-hah EHL rehl-LEH-noh EHN LAH LEE-stah Y PÁG-eh-loh EHN KAH-hah
responses.french: Elija el relleno en la lista y páguelo en caja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the display cases are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo ver los productos en los escaparates?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day PWAY-doh vehr lohs pro-DOOK-tohs en lohs ehs-kah-pah-RAH-tehs?

likely_response.local: Delante de usted, siguiendo la pared derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: deh-LAHN-teh DEH oo-STEHD see-g-ee-EHN-doh LAH pah-REHD deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: In front of you, along the right wall.

responses.english: In front of you, along the right wall.
responses.phonetic: deh-LAHN-teh DEH oo-STEHD see-g-ee-EHN-doh LAH pah-REHD deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Delante de usted, siguiendo la pared derecha.
